Shifts the graph UP k units: 将图表向上移动 k 单位
Shifts the graph RIGHT h units: 将图图向右移 h 单位
Shifts the graph LEFT h units: 移动图形 LEFT h 单位
Vertical stretch (makes the graph narrow: 垂直伸展( 使图形缩小)
What does a·f(x) do when 0 < |a| < 1?: 当 0 < a < 1 时 a-f( x) 做什么 ?
Vertical compression (makes the graph wi: 垂直压缩( 使图表更宽)
Reflects the graph over the x-axis: 反射 X 轴上的图形
Reflects the graph over the y-axis: 在 Y 轴上映射图形
Reflects over the x-axis and vertically: X轴反射和垂直伸展面反射乘以 2
